creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Update to 2.9.0.3.  This is a security update, according to the
announce message:

    Welcome to phpMyAdmin 2.9.0.3 which contains a security
    fix. Details will follow on the security page of phpmyadmin.net.

    Downloads: http://www.phpmyadmin.net

    Marc Delisle, for the team

Security announcement PMSA-2006-6:

http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/security.php?issue=PMASA-2006-6

Other advisories:

http://secunia.com/advisories/22599/

Release Notes:

http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=460128&group_id=23067
